dict.string: SoniqueBar needs to control other apps to execute commands like opening files or controlling HomeKit.
SoniqueBar needs access to your calendar to answer questions like "What's on my calendar today?"
SoniqueBar needs access to your calendar to answer questions about your schedule.
SoniqueBar needs access to your contacts to answer questions about people.
SoniqueBar needs HomeKit access to control smart home devices via voice.
SoniqueBar may need microphone access for future voice features.
SoniqueBar uses speech recognition to convert voice commands to text for processing.
SoniqueBar needs full access to reminders to create, read, and update tasks.
SoniqueBar needs access to reminders to help you manage tasks via voice.
SoniqueBar needs screen recording permission for live screen capture to answer "what's on my screen" questions.
SoniqueBar needs system administration access to manage Docker containers and system services.
SoniqueBar needs your location to provide local weather information when you ask "what's the weather?"
